beats.label: Ordinary World
beats.purpose: Hero's normal life before the adventure.

beats.label: Call to Adventure
beats.purpose: A problem or challenge presents itself.

beats.label: Refusal of the Call
beats.purpose: Hero hesitates or refuses out of fear.

beats.label: Meeting the Mentor
beats.purpose: Hero gains guidance or a tool.

beats.label: Crossing the Threshold
beats.purpose: Hero commits to the special world.

beats.label: Tests, Allies, Enemies
beats.purpose: Hero learns the rules of the new world.

beats.label: Approach to the Inmost Cave
beats.purpose: Preparations for the major challenge.

beats.label: Ordeal
beats.purpose: The central crisis — a brush with death.

beats.label: Reward (Seizing the Sword)
beats.purpose: Hero takes the prize after surviving.

beats.label: The Road Back
beats.purpose: Consequences chase the hero home.

beats.label: Resurrection
beats.purpose: Final test; hero is reborn transformed.

beats.label: Return with the Elixir
beats.purpose: Hero returns changed, with a boon.

beats.label: Ki (起) — Introduction
beats.purpose: Introduce characters, era, and setting.

beats.label: Shō (承) — Development
beats.purpose: Develop the situation; no dramatic turns yet.

beats.label: Ten (転) — Twist
beats.purpose: An unforeseen turn recontextualizes everything.

beats.label: Ketsu (結) — Conclusion
beats.purpose: Reconcile the twist into a harmonious close.

beats.label: Opening Image
beats.purpose: A snapshot of the hero's world + tone before change.

beats.label: Theme Stated
beats.purpose: Someone states what the story is really about.

beats.label: Setup
beats.purpose: Hero's status quo, flaws, and what's missing.

beats.label: Catalyst
beats.purpose: The inciting incident that upends the status quo.

beats.label: Debate
beats.purpose: Hero hesitates — should they go?

beats.label: Break into Two
beats.purpose: Hero commits and enters the new world.

beats.label: B Story
beats.purpose: The relationship/theme subplot begins.

beats.label: Fun and Games
beats.purpose: The promise of the premise — set-pieces.

beats.label: Midpoint
beats.purpose: A false victory or false defeat raises stakes.

beats.label: Bad Guys Close In
beats.purpose: Pressure mounts internally and externally.

beats.label: All Is Lost
beats.purpose: The lowest point; a 'whiff of death'.

beats.label: Dark Night of the Soul
beats.purpose: Hero wallows before the breakthrough.

beats.label: Break into Three
beats.purpose: The solution synthesizing A and B stories.

beats.label: Finale
beats.purpose: Hero executes the plan; world is set right.

beats.label: Final Image
beats.purpose: Mirror of the opening — proof of change.

beats.label: You
beats.purpose: A character in a zone of comfort.

beats.label: Need
beats.purpose: But they want something.

beats.label: Go
beats.purpose: They enter an unfamiliar situation.

beats.label: Search
beats.purpose: Adapt to it.

beats.label: Find
beats.purpose: Get what they wanted.

beats.label: Take
beats.purpose: Pay a heavy price for it.

beats.label: Return
beats.purpose: Then return to their familiar situation.

beats.label: Change
beats.purpose: Having changed.

beats.label: Act I — Setup
beats.purpose: Establish world, characters, and the inciting incident.

beats.label: Act II — Confrontation
beats.purpose: Rising action, midpoint, and the low point.

beats.label: Act III — Resolution
beats.purpose: Climax and dénouement.

beats.label: Hook
beats.purpose: Open mid-tension; promise the arc's payoff fast.

beats.label: World / Power Establishment
beats.purpose: Stakes, the protagonist's edge, and the goal.

beats.label: Rising Conflict
beats.purpose: Escalating obstacles and rival pressure.

beats.label: Setback / Crisis
beats.purpose: A hard loss or trap that raises the cost.

beats.label: Climax / Payoff
beats.purpose: The earned turnaround — the chapter the readers waited for.

beats.label: Resolution & Next-Arc Seed
beats.purpose: Bank the win; plant the hook for the next arc.
